name: Pizza Roll Bread
recipeIngredient: 1 1 1/2 pounds Sweet Italian sausage (removed from casings)
recipeInstructions:
1. Make the dough: In a large bowl, mix flour and salt.
2. Make a well in the center and add yeast, warm water, oil, and sugar.
3. Let stand for 5 minutes until the yeast dissolves and becomes foamy.
4. Beat with a spoon to make a soft dough. Knead on a floured surface until smooth and elastic, adding more flour as needed.
5. Place in a greased bowl, cover, and let rise double.
6. Make the filling: Crumble sausage and cook over medium-high heat to break up the meat. Drain off fat.
7. Stir in tomato paste, onion, and seasonings. Remove from heat and let cool.
8. Punch down the dough and divide into two halves.
9. Roll each piece into a 14 x 9 inch rectangle.
10. Spread half of the filling onto half an inch of the sides.
11. Top with half of the cheeses and drizzle with olive oil.
12. Roll up tightly from one long side, pinching edges and tucking under to seal.
13. Place on a large baking sheet seam-side down, two inches apart.
14. Bend each roll into a crescent shape.
15. Bake in a 400°F oven for 45 minutes or until golden and done.
16. Cool for 30 minutes before cutting. Serve warm or at room temperature.
